title: Saffron Pineapple Indian Stir Fry
description: A flavorful and aromatic Indian-inspired stir fry made with saffron-infused fluffy rice, sautéed pineapple, and spices. A perfect vegetarian dish for a quick dinner.
instructions: Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add cumin powder and turmeric powder. Cook for 1 minute.
Add chopped onion and minced garlic. Cook until onion is translucent.
Add pineapple chunks and cook for 3-4 minutes.
Add soaked saffron and its liquid. Stir well.
Add fluffy rice to the skillet and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes.
Serves hot garnished with chopped fresh cilantro, if desired.
